name: Corn Pudding (Finsand)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the vegetable cooking spray in a bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into a baking dish coated with the vegetable cooking spray.
3. Bake at 325°F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until firm.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Calories: 55
Source: The Complete Diabetic Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand, brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master.
